---
title: "Look up a trial"
pagetitle: "WISSPAR — Look up a trial"
---

Search the pneumococcal vaccine trials in the WISSPAR database by trial number
(NCT), title, sponsor, condition, vaccine, or country. Click any trial to open
its full record — design, eligibility, outcomes, locations, references, and
reported results where available. Details are pulled from a static snapshot of
[ClinicalTrials.gov](https://clinicaltrials.gov){target="_blank"} metadata.

```{=html}
<div class="trials-controls">
  <input id="lk-search" type="search" placeholder="Search NCT, title, sponsor, vaccine, country…" aria-label="Search trials by NCT number, title, sponsor, vaccine, or country" style="flex:1;min-width:280px;" />
  <select id="lk-phase" aria-label="Filter by phase"><option value="">All phases</option></select>
  <select id="lk-status" aria-label="Filter by status"><option value="">All statuses</option></select>
  <select id="lk-sponsor" aria-label="Filter by sponsor"><option value="">All sponsors</option></select>
</div>
<div class="trials-count" id="lk-count"></div>
<div id="lk-results"></div>

<div id="lk-drawer" class="lk-drawer" aria-hidden="true" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="lk-drawer-title">
  <div class="lk-drawer-panel" tabindex="-1">
    <button class="lk-drawer-close" id="lk-drawer-close" aria-label="Close record">&times;</button>
    <div class="lk-drawer-content" id="lk-drawer-content"></div>
  </div>
</div>
<div id="lk-backdrop" class="lk-backdrop" hidden></div>

<script type="module">
const INDEX_URL = "data/trials_meta.json";
const DETAIL_URL = (nct) => `data/trials/${nct}.json`;

/* ---------- small helpers ---------- */
const esc = (s) => String(s ?? "").replace(/[&<>"]/g, (c) =>
  ({ "&": "&amp;", "<": "&lt;", ">": "&gt;", '"': "&quot;" }[c]));
const natSort = (a, b) =>
  String(a).localeCompare(String(b), undefined, { numeric: true, sensitivity: "base" });
const phaseLabel = (p) => p ? p.replace(/PHASE/g, "Phase ").replace(/NA/g, "N/A").replace(/\s+/g, " ").trim() : "—";
const titleCase = (s) => s ? s.split(/[\s_]+/).map((w) => w.charAt(0) + w.slice(1).toLowerCase()).join(" ") : "";
const nl2br = (s) => esc(s).replace(/\n/g, "<br>");
const fmtInt = (n) => (n == null || n === "") ? "—" : Number(n).toLocaleString();
const fmtDate = (d) => d || "—";
const has = (v) => v != null && v !== "" && !(Array.isArray(v) && v.length === 0);

/* Build a definition-grid of key/value rows, skipping empties. */
function grid(pairs) {
  const rows = pairs.filter(([, v]) => has(v))
    .map(([k, v]) => `<div class="lk-row"><span class="lk-k">${esc(k)}</span><span class="lk-v">${v}</span></div>`)
    .join("");
  return rows ? `<div class="lk-grid">${rows}</div>` : "";
}
/* A collapsible or plain section with a heading and body html. */
function section(id, title, bodyHtml, { open = true, collapsible = false } = {}) {
  if (!bodyHtml || !bodyHtml.trim()) return "";
  if (collapsible) {
    return `<details class="lk-sec" id="${id}"${open ? " open" : ""}>
      <summary><h3>${esc(title)}</h3></summary>
      <div class="lk-sec-body">${bodyHtml}</div></details>`;
  }
  return `<section class="lk-sec lk-sec--static" id="${id}">
    <h3>${esc(title)}</h3><div class="lk-sec-body">${bodyHtml}</div></section>`;
}
function tagRow(items, cls = "") {
  const t = (items || []).filter(Boolean)
    .map((x) => `<span class="lk-tag ${cls}">${esc(x)}</span>`).join("");
  return t ? `<div class="lk-tags lk-tags--wrap">${t}</div>` : "";
}
function table(headers, rows, caption) {
  if (!rows || !rows.length) return "";
  const thead = `<tr>${headers.map((h) => `<th scope="col">${esc(h)}</th>`).join("")}</tr>`;
  const tbody = rows.map((r) => `<tr>${r.map((c) => `<td>${c}</td>`).join("")}</tr>`).join("");
  const capHtml = caption ? `<caption>${esc(caption)}</caption>` : "";
  return `<div class="lk-tablewrap"><table class="lk-table">${capHtml}<thead>${thead}</thead><tbody>${tbody}</tbody></table></div>`;
}

/* ---------- detail-record section renderers ---------- */
function renderIdentification(p) {
  const id = p.identificationModule || {};
  const org = (id.orgStudyIdInfo || {}).id;
  const secondary = (id.secondaryIdInfos || []).map((s) => s.id);
  return grid([
    ["Acronym", id.acronym && esc(id.acronym)],
    ["Org study ID", org && esc(org)],
    ["Secondary IDs", secondary.length ? secondary.map(esc).join(", ") : null],
  ]);
}

function renderStatus(p) {
  const st = p.statusModule || {};
  const sp = p.sponsorCollaboratorsModule || {};
  const ov = p.oversightModule || {};
  const rp = sp.responsibleParty || {};
  const flags = [
    ov.isFdaRegulatedDrug ? "FDA-regulated drug" : null,
    ov.isFdaRegulatedDevice ? "FDA-regulated device" : null,
    ov.oversightHasDmc ? "Has data monitoring committee" : null,
  ].filter(Boolean);
  return grid([
    ["Lead sponsor", esc((sp.leadSponsor || {}).name)],
    ["Collaborators", (sp.collaborators || []).length
      ? (sp.collaborators || []).map((c) => esc(c.name)).join(", ") : null],
    ["Responsible party", rp.type
      ? esc([titleCase(rp.type), rp.investigatorFullName, rp.investigatorTitle].filter(Boolean).join(" — ")) : null],
    ["Study start", fmtDate((st.startDateStruct || {}).date)],
    ["Primary completion", fmtDate((st.primaryCompletionDateStruct || {}).date)],
    ["Study completion", fmtDate((st.completionDateStruct || {}).date)],
    ["First posted", fmtDate((st.studyFirstPostDateStruct || {}).date)],
    ["Last updated", fmtDate((st.lastUpdatePostDateStruct || {}).date)],
    ["Results posted", fmtDate((st.resultsFirstPostDateStruct || {}).date)],
    ["Why stopped", st.whyStopped && esc(st.whyStopped)],
    ["Oversight", flags.length ? esc(flags.join(" · ")) : null],
  ]);
}

function renderDescription(p) {
  const ds = p.descriptionModule || {};
  const co = p.conditionsModule || {};
  let html = "";
  if (ds.briefSummary) html += `<p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(ds.briefSummary)}</p>`;
  if (ds.detailedDescription)
    html += `<details class="lk-more"><summary>Detailed description</summary>
      <p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(ds.detailedDescription)}</p></details>`;
  const conds = co.conditions || [];
  const keys = co.keywords || [];
  if (conds.length) html += `<div class="lk-subhead">Conditions</div>${tagRow(conds)}`;
  if (keys.length) html += `<div class="lk-subhead">Keywords</div>${tagRow(keys, "lk-tag--key")}`;
  return html;
}

function renderDesign(p) {
  const de = p.designModule || {};
  const di = de.designInfo || {};
  const mask = (di.maskingInfo || {}).masking;
  const en = de.enrollmentInfo || {};
  return grid([
    ["Study type", esc(titleCase(de.studyType))],
    ["Phase", (de.phases || []).length ? esc(phaseLabel((de.phases || []).join(", "))) : null],
    ["Allocation", esc(titleCase(di.allocation))],
    ["Intervention model", esc(titleCase(di.interventionModel))],
    ["Primary purpose", esc(titleCase(di.primaryPurpose))],
    ["Masking", mask ? esc(titleCase(mask)) : null],
    ["Enrollment", en.count != null ? `${fmtInt(en.count)}${en.type ? " (" + titleCase(en.type) + ")" : ""}` : null],
  ]);
}

function renderArms(p) {
  const ai = p.armsInterventionsModule || {};
  const arms = ai.armGroups || [];
  const ivs = ai.interventions || [];
  let html = "";
  if (arms.length) {
    html += `<div class="lk-subhead">Study arms / groups</div>`;
    html += arms.map((a) => `<div class="lk-item">
      <div class="lk-item-head">${esc(a.label)}${a.type ? ` <span class="lk-tag">${esc(titleCase(a.type))}</span>` : ""}</div>
      ${a.description ? `<p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(a.description)}</p>` : ""}
      ${(a.interventionNames || []).length ? `<div class="lk-item-sub">${(a.interventionNames || []).map(esc).join(" · ")}</div>` : ""}
    </div>`).join("");
  }
  if (ivs.length) {
    html += `<div class="lk-subhead">Interventions</div>`;
    html += ivs.map((i) => `<div class="lk-item">
      <div class="lk-item-head">${i.type ? `<span class="lk-tag">${esc(titleCase(i.type))}</span> ` : ""}${esc(i.name)}</div>
      ${i.description ? `<p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(i.description)}</p>` : ""}
      ${(i.otherNames || []).length ? `<div class="lk-item-sub">Also known as: ${(i.otherNames || []).map(esc).join(", ")}</div>` : ""}
    </div>`).join("");
  }
  return html;
}

function renderOutcomes(p) {
  const om = p.outcomesModule || {};
  const block = (list, label) => {
    if (!(list || []).length) return "";
    return `<div class="lk-subhead">${label}</div>` + list.map((o) => `<div class="lk-item">
      <div class="lk-item-head">${esc(o.measure)}</div>
      ${o.description ? `<p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(o.description)}</p>` : ""}
      ${o.timeFrame ? `<div class="lk-item-sub"><strong>Time frame:</strong> ${esc(o.timeFrame)}</div>` : ""}
    </div>`).join("");
  };
  return block(om.primaryOutcomes, "Primary outcomes") + block(om.secondaryOutcomes, "Secondary outcomes");
}

function renderEligibility(p) {
  const el = p.eligibilityModule || {};
  let html = grid([
    ["Sex", esc(titleCase(el.sex))],
    ["Ages", esc([el.minimumAge, el.maximumAge].filter(Boolean).join(" to ")) || (el.stdAges || []).map(titleCase).join(", ")],
    ["Age groups", (el.stdAges || []).length ? esc((el.stdAges || []).map(titleCase).join(", ")) : null],
    ["Healthy volunteers", el.healthyVolunteers === true ? "Accepts healthy volunteers" : (el.healthyVolunteers === false ? "No" : null)],
  ]);
  if (el.eligibilityCriteria)
    html += `<details class="lk-more" open><summary>Eligibility criteria</summary>
      <pre class="lk-criteria">${esc(el.eligibilityCriteria)}</pre></details>`;
  return html;
}

function renderLocations(p) {
  const cl = p.contactsLocationsModule || {};
  const locs = cl.locations || [];
  if (!locs.length) return "";
  const rows = locs.map((l) => [
    esc(l.facility || "—"),
    esc([l.city, l.state].filter(Boolean).join(", ") || "—"),
    esc(l.country || "—"),
    l.status ? `<span class="lk-tag lk-tag--status">${esc(titleCase(l.status))}</span>` : "—",
  ]);
  return `<div class="lk-muted">${locs.length} location${locs.length === 1 ? "" : "s"}</div>`
    + table(["Facility", "City / State", "Country", "Status"], rows, "Trial locations");
}

function renderReferences(p) {
  const rm = p.referencesModule || {};
  const refs = rm.references || [];
  if (!refs.length) return "";
  return refs.map((r) => {
    const cite = esc(r.citation || "");
    const link = r.pmid
      ? ` <a href="https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/${esc(r.pmid)}/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">PMID ${esc(r.pmid)} <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span><span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a>`
      : "";
    const type = r.type ? `<span class="lk-tag">${esc(titleCase(r.type))}</span> ` : "";
    return `<div class="lk-item"><div>${type}${cite}${link}</div></div>`;
  }).join("");
}

/* ---------- results section (rendered only when present) ---------- */
function affRow(a, r) { // affected of at-risk
  if (r == null) return "—";
  return `${fmtInt(a ?? 0)} / ${fmtInt(r)}`;
}

function renderParticipantFlow(pf) {
  let html = "";
  if (pf.recruitmentDetails) html += `<p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(pf.recruitmentDetails)}</p>`;
  const groups = pf.groups || [];
  const periods = pf.periods || [];
  // Summarise started / completed per group across the first period.
  if (groups.length && periods.length) {
    const per = periods[0];
    const milestoneMap = {};
    (per.milestones || []).forEach((m) => {
      milestoneMap[m.type] = {};
      (m.achievements || []).forEach((a) => { milestoneMap[m.type][a.groupId] = a.numSubjects; });
    });
    const started = milestoneMap["STARTED"] || {};
    const completed = milestoneMap["COMPLETED"] || {};
    const rows = groups.map((g) => [
      esc(g.title),
      fmtInt(started[g.id]),
      fmtInt(completed[g.id]),
    ]);
    html += table(["Group", "Started", "Completed"], rows, "Participant flow by group");
    if (periods.length > 1 || (per.title && per.title !== "Overall Study"))
      html += `<div class="lk-muted">Milestones shown for period: ${esc(per.title || "—")}. See full record for all periods.</div>`;
  }
  return html;
}

function renderAdverseEvents(ae) {
  let html = "";
  const meta = [];
  if (ae.frequencyThreshold != null) meta.push(`Frequency threshold: ${esc(ae.frequencyThreshold)}%`);
  if (meta.length) html += `<div class="lk-muted">${meta.join(" · ")}</div>`;
  const groups = ae.eventGroups || [];
  if (groups.length) {
    const rows = groups.map((g) => [
      esc(g.title),
      affRow(g.deathsNumAffected, g.deathsNumAtRisk),
      affRow(g.seriousNumAffected, g.seriousNumAtRisk),
      affRow(g.otherNumAffected, g.otherNumAtRisk),
    ]);
    html += `<div class="lk-subhead">Summary (subjects affected / at risk)</div>`;
    html += table(["Group", "Deaths", "Serious AEs", "Other AEs"], rows, "Adverse event summary by group");
  }
  const topEvents = (list, label) => {
    const evs = (list || []).slice().sort((a, b) => {
      const sum = (e) => (e.stats || []).reduce((n, s) => n + (s.numAffected || 0), 0);
      return sum(b) - sum(a);
    }).slice(0, 10);
    if (!evs.length) return "";
    const rows = evs.map((e) => [
      esc(e.term),
      esc(e.organSystem || "—"),
      fmtInt((e.stats || []).reduce((n, s) => n + (s.numAffected || 0), 0)),
    ]);
    return `<div class="lk-subhead">${label} <span class="lk-muted">(top ${evs.length} by subjects affected)</span></div>`
      + table(["Term", "Organ system", "Subjects affected"], rows, label);
  };
  html += topEvents(ae.seriousEvents, "Serious adverse events");
  html += topEvents(ae.otherEvents, "Other adverse events");
  return html;
}

function renderOutcomeMeasures(om) {
  const measures = om.outcomeMeasures || [];
  if (!measures.length) return "";
  return measures.map((m) => {
    const meta = grid([
      ["Type", esc(titleCase(m.type))],
      ["Reporting", esc(titleCase(m.reportingStatus))],
      ["Parameter", esc([titleCase(m.paramType), m.unitOfMeasure].filter(Boolean).join(", "))],
      ["Dispersion", m.dispersionType && esc(m.dispersionType)],
      ["Time frame", m.timeFrame && esc(m.timeFrame)],
      ["Population", m.populationDescription && esc(m.populationDescription)],
    ]);
    // Render the first class's category values per group as a compact table.
    let dataTable = "";
    const cls = (m.classes || [])[0];
    const groups = m.groups || [];
    if (cls && groups.length) {
      const cats = cls.categories || [];
      const rows = [];
      cats.forEach((cat) => {
        const byGroup = {};
        (cat.measurements || []).forEach((meas) => { byGroup[meas.groupId] = meas; });
        const cells = groups.map((g) => {
          const meas = byGroup[g.id];
          if (!meas) return "—";
          let v = esc(meas.value ?? "—");
          if (meas.lowerLimit != null && meas.upperLimit != null)
            v += ` <span class="lk-muted">(${esc(meas.lowerLimit)}–${esc(meas.upperLimit)})</span>`;
          else if (meas.spread != null) v += ` <span class="lk-muted">±${esc(meas.spread)}</span>`;
          return v;
        });
        rows.push([esc(cat.title || (m.title)), ...cells]);
      });
      if (rows.length)
        dataTable = table(["", ...groups.map((g) => g.title)], rows, `${m.title} by group`);
    }
    return `<details class="lk-more"><summary>${esc(m.title)} <span class="lk-tag">${esc(titleCase(m.type))}</span></summary>
      ${m.description ? `<p class="lk-prose">${nl2br(m.description)}</p>` : ""}
      ${meta}${dataTable}</details>`;
  }).join("");
}

/* ---------- assemble the full record ---------- */
function renderRecord(detail, indexRow) {
  const p = detail.protocolSection || {};
  const rs = detail.resultsSection;
  const id = p.identificationModule || {};
  const st = p.statusModule || {};
  const de = p.designModule || {};
  const nct = id.nctId || detail.nctId;
  const title = id.briefTitle || id.officialTitle || nct;

  const badges = [
    (de.phases || []).length ? `<span class="lk-tag">${esc(phaseLabel((de.phases || []).join(", ")))}</span>` : "",
    st.overallStatus ? `<span class="lk-tag lk-tag--status">${esc(titleCase(st.overallStatus))}</span>` : "",
    detail.hasResults ? `<span class="lk-tag lk-tag--results">Has results</span>` : "",
  ].filter(Boolean).join("");

  const header = `<div class="lk-drawer-header">
    <div class="lk-drawer-nct"><a href="https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/${esc(nct)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">${esc(nct)} <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span><span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a></div>
    <h2 id="lk-drawer-title">${esc(title)}</h2>
    ${id.officialTitle && id.officialTitle !== title ? `<p class="lk-official">${esc(id.officialTitle)}</p>` : ""}
    <div class="lk-tags lk-tags--wrap">${badges}</div>
  </div>`;

  const sections = [
    section("sec-overview", "Overview", renderStatus(p) + renderIdentification(p)),
    section("sec-about", "About the study", renderDescription(p)),
    section("sec-design", "Study design", renderDesign(p)),
    section("sec-arms", "Arms & interventions", renderArms(p), { collapsible: true }),
    section("sec-outcomes", "Outcome measures", renderOutcomes(p), { collapsible: true }),
    section("sec-eligibility", "Eligibility", renderEligibility(p), { collapsible: true }),
    section("sec-locations", "Locations", renderLocations(p), { collapsible: true, open: false }),
    section("sec-references", "Publications & references", renderReferences(p), { collapsible: true, open: false }),
  ];

  if (rs) {
    const resHtml = [
      rs.participantFlowModule ? section("sec-flow", "Participant flow", renderParticipantFlow(rs.participantFlowModule), { collapsible: true, open: false }) : "",
      rs.outcomeMeasuresModule ? section("sec-om", "Outcome measure results", renderOutcomeMeasures(rs.outcomeMeasuresModule), { collapsible: true, open: false }) : "",
      rs.adverseEventsModule ? section("sec-ae", "Adverse events", renderAdverseEvents(rs.adverseEventsModule), { collapsible: true, open: false }) : "",
    ].join("");
    if (resHtml.trim()) {
      sections.push(`<div class="lk-results-banner">Reported results
        <a href="https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/${esc(nct)}?tab=results" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Full results on ClinicalTrials.gov <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span><span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a></div>`);
      sections.push(resHtml);
    }
  }

  sections.push(`<p class="lk-link"><a href="https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/${esc(nct)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">View the complete record on ClinicalTrials.gov <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span><span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a></p>`);

  return header + `<div class="lk-drawer-body">${sections.filter(Boolean).join("")}</div>`;
}

/* ---------- drawer open / close ---------- */
const drawer = document.getElementById("lk-drawer");
const backdrop = document.getElementById("lk-backdrop");
const drawerContent = document.getElementById("lk-drawer-content");
const drawerPanel = drawer.querySelector(".lk-drawer-panel");
let lastFocus = null;
const detailCache = new Map();

async function openTrial(nct, indexRow) {
  lastFocus = document.activeElement;
  drawer.classList.add("is-open");
  drawer.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "false");
  backdrop.hidden = false;
  document.body.classList.add("lk-noscroll");
  drawerContent.innerHTML = `<div class="lk-drawer-loading">Loading ${esc(nct)}…</div>`;
  drawerPanel.scrollTop = 0;
  if (location.hash !== `#${nct}`) history.pushState({ nct }, "", `#${nct}`);
  drawerPanel.focus();

  try {
    let detail = detailCache.get(nct);
    if (!detail) {
      detail = await (await fetch(DETAIL_URL(nct))).json();
      detailCache.set(nct, detail);
    }
    drawerContent.innerHTML = renderRecord(detail, indexRow);
  } catch (e) {
    drawerContent.innerHTML = `<div class="lk-drawer-loading">Could not load this record.
      <a href="https://clinicaltrials.gov/study/${esc(nct)}" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Open it on ClinicalTrials.gov <span aria-hidden="true">↗</span><span class="visually-hidden"> (opens in a new tab)</span></a></div>`;
  }
}

function closeDrawer(fromPop) {
  if (!drawer.classList.contains("is-open")) return;
  drawer.classList.remove("is-open");
  drawer.setAttribute("aria-hidden", "true");
  backdrop.hidden = true;
  document.body.classList.remove("lk-noscroll");
  if (!fromPop && location.hash) history.pushState("", "", location.pathname + location.search);
  if (lastFocus && lastFocus.focus) lastFocus.focus();
}

document.getElementById("lk-drawer-close").addEventListener("click", () => closeDrawer());
backdrop.addEventListener("click", () => closeDrawer());
document.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
  if (e.key === "Escape") { closeDrawer(); return; }
  if (e.key !== "Tab" || !drawer.classList.contains("is-open")) return;
  const focusables = drawerPanel.querySelectorAll(
    'a[href], button:not([disabled]), input:not([disabled]), select:not([disabled]), textarea:not([disabled]), [tabindex]:not([tabindex="-1"])'
  );
  if (!focusables.length) return;
  const first = focusables[0];
  const last = focusables[focusables.length - 1];
  if (e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === first) {
    e.preventDefault();
    last.focus();
  } else if (!e.shiftKey && document.activeElement === last) {
    e.preventDefault();
    first.focus();
  }
});

/* ---------- list + search ---------- */
(async function () {
  const results = document.getElementById("lk-results");
  const countEl = document.getElementById("lk-count");
  let trials;
  try {
    trials = await (await fetch(INDEX_URL)).json();
  } catch (e) {
    countEl.textContent = "Could not load trial metadata.";
    return;
  }
  const byId = new Map(trials.map((t) => [t.nctId, t]));

  const search = document.getElementById("lk-search");
  const phaseSel = document.getElementById("lk-phase");
  const statusSel = document.getElementById("lk-status");
  const sponsorSel = document.getElementById("lk-sponsor");

  const phases = [...new Set(trials.flatMap((t) => (t.phase || "").split(", ").filter(Boolean)))].sort(natSort);
  phases.forEach((p) => phaseSel.add(new Option(phaseLabel(p), p)));
  [...new Set(trials.map((t) => t.status).filter(Boolean))].sort()
    .forEach((s) => statusSel.add(new Option(titleCase(s), s)));
  [...new Set(trials.map((t) => t.sponsor).filter(Boolean))].sort(natSort)
    .forEach((s) => sponsorSel.add(new Option(s, s)));

  const hay = (t) => [
    t.nctId, t.title, t.officialTitle, t.sponsor,
    (t.conditions || []).join(" "), (t.interventions || []).join(" "),
    (t.countries || []).join(" "), (t.collaborators || []).join(" "),
  ].join(" ").toLowerCase();

  function card(t) {
    const meta = [
      t.phase ? `<span class="lk-tag">${esc(phaseLabel(t.phase))}</span>` : "",
      t.status ? `<span class="lk-tag lk-tag--status">${esc(titleCase(t.status))}</span>` : "",
      t.enrollment != null ? `<span class="lk-tag">n=${esc(t.enrollment)}</span>` : "",
      t.hasResults ? `<span class="lk-tag lk-tag--results">Results</span>` : "",
    ].filter(Boolean).join("");
    const sub = [
      esc(t.sponsor),
      (t.conditions || []).slice(0, 3).map(esc).join(", "),
      (t.countries || []).slice(0, 4).map(esc).join(", "),
    ].filter(Boolean).join(" · ");
    return `<button class="lk-card" data-nct="${esc(t.nctId)}">
      <span class="lk-card-top">
        <span class="lk-nct">${esc(t.nctId)}</span>
        <span class="lk-title">${esc(t.title)}</span>
        <span class="lk-tags">${meta}</span>
      </span>
      ${sub ? `<span class="lk-card-sub">${sub}</span>` : ""}
    </button>`;
  }

  function render() {
    const q = search.value.trim().toLowerCase();
    const ph = phaseSel.value, stt = statusSel.value, sp = sponsorSel.value;
    let view = trials.filter((t) => {
      if (ph && !(t.phase || "").split(", ").includes(ph)) return false;
      if (stt && t.status !== stt) return false;
      if (sp && t.sponsor !== sp) return false;
      if (q && !hay(t).includes(q)) return false;
      return true;
    });
    view.sort((a, b) => natSort(a.nctId, b.nctId));
    results.innerHTML = view.map(card).join("") || `<p class="lk-empty">No trials match your search.</p>`;
    countEl.textContent = `${view.length} of ${trials.length} trials`;
  }

  results.addEventListener("click", (e) => {
    const btn = e.target.closest(".lk-card");
    if (btn) openTrial(btn.dataset.nct, byId.get(btn.dataset.nct));
  });

  [search, phaseSel, statusSel, sponsorSel].forEach((el) => el.addEventListener("input", render));
  render();

  // Deep-link / back-button support.
  function syncFromHash() {
    const nct = decodeURIComponent(location.hash.replace(/^#/, ""));
    if (/^NCT\d+/i.test(nct)) openTrial(nct.toUpperCase(), byId.get(nct.toUpperCase()));
    else closeDrawer(true);
  }
  window.addEventListener("popstate", syncFromHash);
  if (location.hash) syncFromHash();
})();
</script>
```
